title: Expert Psychologists & Psychiatrists for Your Case | Psychology Direct
description: Access 1,000+ vetted psychologists and psychiatrists for expert witness reports and educational assessments. Fast matching, Legal Aid rates.

blocks.headline: Get the Right Expert for Your Case in Hours
blocks.subtitle: Find the right expert fast. With 1,000+ vetted psychologists and psychiatrists nationwide, we match you in hours and deliver court-ready reports in 4–6 weeks. Legal Aid rates? Always accepted.

blocks.heading: Get the Expert You Need, When You Need Them
blocks.subheading: Legal, education, and professional services — all from one platform

cards.title: Expert Witness Services
cards.description: Access psychologists and psychiatrists for family law, criminal, civil, and immigration cases. HCPC/GMC registered, court-ready reports delivered on time.

cards.title: Educational Psychology
cards.description: EHCP assessments, SEND support, and statutory evaluations from experienced Educational Psychologists matched to your LA or school.

cards.title: Join Our Network
cards.description: Psychologists and psychiatrists: register to access steady referrals, fair pay, admin support, and a collaborative community.

blocks.imageAlt: Psychology Direct's network of vetted professionals
blocks.heading: 1,000+ Vetted Professionals
blocks.body: Every psychologist and psychiatrist in our network is HCPC or GMC registered, enhanced DBS checked, and professionally insured. We review sample reports before registration and quality-check every deliverable. You get the right expert — vetted, matched, and ready to work.

blocks.heading: Get Matched to Your Expert in 4 Simple Steps

steps.title: Tell Us What You Need
steps.description: Call 01306 879 975 or complete a brief online form. Describe your case type, location, and deadline.

steps.title: Receive Matched Experts
steps.description: Within 24 hours, get 2–3 CVs with quotes from professionals matched to your specialism.

steps.title: We Handle Everything Else
steps.description: Once you instruct, we manage all admin—appointments, coordination, case management. You focus on your case.

steps.title: Court-Ready Report Delivered
steps.description: Your report is 100% quality-checked for accuracy and compliance before delivery. Fast-track available.

blocks.imageAlt: A dedicated client manager discussing a case
blocks.heading: Your Dedicated Client Manager
blocks.body: One person owns your case from first call to report delivery. They match your expert, manage the logistics, coordinate with all parties, and chase deadlines — so you never have to. It's managed service, not a directory.

testimonials.quote: Staff are helpful and informative with a range of experts second to none. Reports are delivered securely and on time. They take the hard work out of locating relevant available experts.
testimonials.name: Brent Patterson
testimonials.title: Solicitor

testimonials.quote: Speed and quality of response in identifying experts who could hit tight timeframes. A very helpful service.
testimonials.name: Tom Battarbee
testimonials.title: Solicitor

testimonials.quote: Psychology Direct provide Educational Psychologist services that are reliable, efficient, flexible, cost effective, proactive and totally empathetic to our needs.
testimonials.name: Stephen Higgins
testimonials.title: Principal EP

testimonials.quote: Deadlines needed to be met and it was extremely useful having services of a local expert. I would definitely use them in the future.
testimonials.name: Steve Harman
testimonials.title: Solicitor

blocks.heading: Not Sure Which Expert You Need?
blocks.bodyText: Different cases require different expertise. Our free 2-minute tool helps you work out whether you need a psychologist, a psychiatrist, or both — with clear, jargon-free explanations.

blocks.heading: Does Your Case Need Expert Evidence?
blocks.bodyText: Not every case requires a psychological or psychiatric report. Answer a few quick questions and find out whether expert evidence would strengthen your case — and what type of expert you'd need.

blocks.heading: Ready to Get Matched?
blocks.bodyText: Need an expert now? Tell us your case type and deadline. We'll match you with vetted professionals ready to work. No long admin delays, no guesswork — just the right expert, fast.
